meaning: adj.镶环(轮,圈)的,轮状的,被包围的
examples: Her eyes were sunken and black-ringed.
The areas are sealed off and ringed by troops.
Thousands of demonstrators ringed the building.
Rangers have now ringed the remaining three osprey chicks so they can be identified and monitored.
The rover hit pay dirt early, landing inside a shallow crater ringed in layered rock outcroppings.
